initial_candidates.sql:
WITH over_runs AS (
    SELECT
        bb.match_id,
        bb.over_id,
        bb.bowler,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) + SUM(er.extra_runs) AS total_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id
    JOIN extra_runs er ON bb.match_id = er.match_id AND bb.over_id = er.over_id
    GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.over_id, bb.bowler
),
max_runs_per_match AS (
    SELECT
        match_id,
        MAX(total_runs) AS max_match_runs
    FROM over_runs
    GROUP BY match_id
),
overs_with_max_runs AS (
    SELECT
        ors.match_id,
        ors.over_id,
        ors.bowler,
        ors.total_runs
    FROM over_runs ors
    JOIN max_runs_per_match mrm ON ors.match_id = mrm.match_id AND ors.total_runs = mrm.max_match_runs
),
ranked_bowlers AS (
    SELECT
        owm.bowler,
        p.player_name,
        owm.match_id,
        owm.total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY owm.bowler ORDER BY owm.total_runs DESC, owm.match_id ASC) AS rn
    FROM overs_with_max_runs owm
    JOIN player p ON owm.bowler = p.player_id
)
SELECT
    rb.player_name,
    rb.match_id,
    rb.total_runs
FROM ranked_bowlers rb
WHERE rb.rn = 1
ORDER BY rb.total_runs DESC, rb.player_name ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH over_runs AS (
    SELECT
        bb.match_id,
        bb.over_id,
        bb.bowler,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) + SUM(er.extra_runs) AS total_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id
    JOIN extra_runs er ON bb.match_id = er.match_id AND bb.over_id = er.over_id
    GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.over_id, bb.bowler
),
max_runs_per_match AS (
    SELECT
        match_id,
        MAX(total_runs) AS max_match_runs
    FROM over_runs
    GROUP BY match_id
),
top_overs AS (
    SELECT
        or1.match_id,
        or1.over_id,
        or1.bowler,
        or1.total_runs
    FROM over_runs or1
    JOIN max_runs_per_match mrp ON or1.match_id = mrp.match_id AND or1.total_runs = mrp.max_match_runs
),
ranked_bowlers AS (
    SELECT
        t.bowler,
        t.match_id,
        t.total_runs,
        p.player_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.total_runs DESC, p.player_name ASC) AS rn
    FROM top_overs t
    JOIN player p ON t.bowler = p.player_id
)
SELECT
    player_name,
    match_id
FROM ranked_bowlers
WHERE rn <= 3;

WITH over_runs AS (
    SELECT
        b.match_id,
        b.over_id,
        b.bowler,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) + SUM(er.extra_runs) AS total_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball b
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON b.match_id = bs.match_id AND b.over_id = bs.over_id
    JOIN extra_runs er ON b.match_id = er.match_id AND b.over_id = er.over_id
    GROUP BY b.match_id, b.over_id, b.bowler
),
max_runs_per_match AS (
    SELECT
        match_id,
        MAX(total_runs) AS max_match_runs
    FROM over_runs
    GROUP BY match_id
),
overs_with_max_runs AS (
    SELECT
        o.match_id,
        o.over_id,
        o.bowler,
        o.total_runs
    FROM over_runs o
    JOIN max_runs_per_match m ON o.match_id = m.match_id AND o.total_runs = m.max_match_runs
),
bowler_max_runs AS (
    SELECT
        bowler,
        total_runs,
        match_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bowler ORDER BY total_runs DESC) AS rn
    FROM overs_with_max_runs
),
top_bowlers AS (
    SELECT
        b.bowler,
        b.total_runs,
        b.match_id
    FROM bowler_max_runs b
    WHERE b.rn = 1
)
SELECT
    p.player_name,
    t.match_id
FROM top_bowlers t
JOIN player p ON t.bowler = p.player_id
ORDER BY t.total_runs DESC, p.player_name ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH over_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bb.match_id,
        bb.over_id,
        bb.bowler,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) + SUM(er.extra_runs) AS total_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id
    JOIN extra_runs er ON bb.match_id = er.match_id AND bb.over_id = er.over_id
    GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.over_id, bb.bowler
),
max_runs_per_match AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        MAX(total_runs) AS max_match_runs
    FROM over_runs
    GROUP BY match_id
),
overs_with_max_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        ors.*
    FROM over_runs ors
    JOIN max_runs_per_match mrp ON ors.match_id = mrp.match_id AND ors.total_runs = mrp.max_match_runs
),
bowler_max_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bowler,
        total_runs,
        match_id,
        player_name
    FROM overs_with_max_runs owm
    JOIN player p ON owm.bowler = p.player_id
)
SELECT 
    player_name,
    match_id
FROM bowler_max_runs
WHERE total_runs = (SELECT MAX(total_runs) FROM bowler_max_runs)
ORDER BY player_name ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH over_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bb.match_id,
        bb.over_id,
        bb.bowler,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) + SUM(er.extra_runs) AS total_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id
    JOIN extra_runs er ON bb.match_id = er.match_id AND bb.over_id = er.over_id
    GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.over_id, bb.bowler
),
max_runs_per_match AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        MAX(total_runs) AS max_match_runs
    FROM over_runs
    GROUP BY match_id
),
top_overs AS (
    SELECT 
        ors.*
    FROM over_runs ors
    JOIN max_runs_per_match mrm ON ors.match_id = mrm.match_id AND ors.total_runs = mrm.max_match_runs
),
bowler_top_overs AS (
    SELECT 
        bo.bowler,
        bo.match_id,
        bo.total_runs,
        p.player_name
    FROM top_overs bo
    JOIN player p ON bo.bowler = p.player_id
),
ranked_bowlers AS (
    SELECT 
        bowler,
        player_name,
        match_id,
        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_runs DESC, player_name ASC) AS rn
    FROM bowler_top_overs
)
SELECT 
    player_name,
    match_id
FROM ranked_bowlers
WHERE rn <= 3;
